f7f1eb1004db.webp.caption: Screenshot/illustration from Adrian Krebs’ ‘The dead Internet is not a theory anymore’ showing LinkedIn being overrun by low-quality/bot content; useful visual for discussing near-zero posting cost, attention markets, and the need for provenance/receipts.

00f374499521.webp.caption: Screenshot/illustration from Adrian Krebs’ ‘The dead Internet is not a theory anymore’ showing Hacker News’ experience with bot/slop dynamics; useful for contrasting community defenses (rate limits, friction) vs spam economics in a post about scarcity + provenance/agent receipts.

d3daac3314f6.webp.caption: Screenshot/graphic from Adrian Krebs’ ‘The dead Internet is not a theory anymore’ showing GitHub-related bot/slop dynamics; useful visual for tying OSS contribution provenance/receipts to review-cost economics and anti-spam friction.
